name: Ko'olau Distillery
tagline: A veteran-owned craft distillery in Kailua making whiskey, rum, and gin — tours, tastings, trivia nights, and food trucks.
parking: Free parking in the Kapaa Quarry Pl industrial complex
hours: Mon & Wed 12pm–7pm. Tue 12pm–8pm. Thu 12pm–9pm. Fri 12pm–10pm. Sat 12pm–9pm. Sun 8am–7pm
bestTime: Thursday trivia nights or weekends for food trucks and live music. Afternoon tours at 1pm, 3pm, or 4pm
talkStory: Tucked in an industrial complex near the Kailua/Kaneohe border, this veteran-owned distillery has quietly become one of Oahu's best hangout spots. One-hour tours cover the full whiskey process from mashing to bottling, ending with a 5-spirit tasting. Their signature Old Pali Road Whiskey is the star. Beyond tours, they have a full bar with craft cocktails, local beers, and wine. Thursday trivia nights are packed, and weekends usually have food trucks and live music in the outdoor area. 21+ for tastings.
